text: Being here, I feel a mix of curiosity and contemplation. There is the crisp order of the modern interior—glass partitions, angled lines, and a subtle hum of possibility in the air. The R+D display draws my attention, its bright colors and sharp text evoking the perpetual motion of thought and progress. I sense an invitation to question how I connect with machines and with others, and wonder if such environments foster inspiration or merely reflect a longing for meaning in innovation.
